title: F. W. Hohenzollern
content:
In things like this I've always tried
    To look upon the Brighter Side;
    And when I see the Prince, I say
    "The Crown's worth something anyway."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Oliver Herford delivers a powerful performance in "F. W. Hohenzollern"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
